_meta.name: gadmin-check-saml-sso
_meta.description: Check Google Admin for SAML/SSO configuration pointing to YeshID. Navigates to Security > SSO with third party IdP. Confirms integration direction: is YeshID the IdP for Google Workspace, or is Google the IdP for YeshID?
_meta.author: session-2026-04-14
anomalies: SAML SSO config for Google as SP (Service Provider) is at /ac/security/ssochoices
If YeshID is IdP: look for YeshID entity ID / SSO URL in SAML config
If Google is IdP: the SAML apps list (/ac/apps/unified) shows YeshID as a SAML SP app

chain.note: Check if SSO with third party IdP is enabled. Look for: Sign-in page URL, Sign-out page URL, entity ID (should reference yeshid.com if YeshID is the IdP).
Also check SAML apps for YeshID as SP
Look for YeshID in the SAML apps list — this means Google is IdP and YeshID is SP (more common direction)
